allowlist_reasons.vitte/compiler: top-level umbrella facade is exported for convenience but not imported by the real compiler entry
allowlist_reasons.vitte/compiler/analysis/typeck/complete: isolated migration facade; production uses run_production_typeck_hir
allowlist_reasons.vitte/compiler/infrastructure: aggregate facade is kept for namespace ergonomics while the real entry imports concrete infrastructure modules
allowlist_reasons.vitte/compiler/ir/ast: bootstrap compatibility fixture; canonical AST lives under frontend/ast
allowlist_reasons.vitte/compiler/ir/hir_to_mir_lowering: bootstrap compatibility fixture; canonical lowering lives under middle/lower
allowlist_reasons.vitte/compiler/ir/mir_extended: bootstrap compatibility fixture; canonical MIR lives under middle/mir
allowlist_reasons.vitte/compiler/ir/mir_optimizations: bootstrap compatibility fixture; canonical passes live under optimizations/mir
allowlist_reasons.vitte/compiler/ir/pipeline: bootstrap compatibility fixture; canonical compiler pipeline uses frontend, analysis, middle, and backend
